title: cicerbita cyprica
intro: Cicerbita cyprica, also known as the Broad-leaved Cicerbita or Cyprian Cicerbita, is a perennial plant belonging to the dandelion family and native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and expectorant effects. The plant's health benefits include relief from coughs, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce blood pressure and improve digestion. Cicerbita cyprica is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
